title: filago albicans
intro: Filago albicans, also known as lesser knapweed or lesser scabious, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Filago albicans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Filago albicans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
